Thought 2: The evidence strongly points to Fred. He had direct access to the murder weapon (the syringe from lost and found), was present at the scene during the time of the murder (on duty), and had a clear motive (Giselle threatened to report his negligence). His nervous behavior and haunting feelings also suggest guilt. Imogen has a financial motive, but there's no evidence she had access to the studio or the syringe. Her escape plan story is intriguing but seems unrelated to this crime—it was told in jest and doesn't directly connect to the murder. Without any evidence placing her at the scene or linking her to the weapon, Fred is the more likely suspect.
